title: Tanacetum nitens
intro: Tanacetum nitens, commonly known as shining tansy, is a flowering plant species in the sunflower family. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, which can aid in relieving digestive issues and reducing pain. Bioactive constituents of Tanacetum nitens include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic acids, which contribute to its therapeutic properties. The plant is commonly used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat conditions like digestive disorders, fever, and menstrual cramps.
